Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-AE Recommendation overdue
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed after the execution of SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average waiting time to the SW-Reviewer Agreed following a Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Reviewer Agreed when preceded by SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Accept in variants that end with acceptance
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and the subsequent SW-Reviewer Declined within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to be followed by another SW-Reviewer Agreed in multi-reviewer assignments
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and Manuscript Export Succeeded in accepted manuscript variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Time of SW-Reviewer Agreed when occurring after SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late versus when occurring before any delay notifications
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases where AE recommendation is explicitly recorded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed after the execution of Assign a Different Editor compared to after initial SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Assign a Different Editor' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and the next occurrence of Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in revision loops
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW–Major Revision due in 1 month in major revision paths
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'end': "activity == 'SW–Major Revision due in 1 month'", 'aggregation': 'minimum'}"

Name: Minimum time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit in resubmission outcomes
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'", 'aggregation': 'minimum'}"
